whats_new.title: Automatic indexing
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 19c can automatically create, rebuild, and drop indexes based on application workload changes.

whats_new.title: Real-time statistics
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 19c automatically gathers online statistics during conventional DML operations.

whats_new.title: SQL quarantine
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 19c can quarantine execution plans for SQL statements that consume excessive CPU or I/O resources.

behavior_changes.title: Oracle Database changes, desupports, and deprecations consolidated
behavior_changes.description: Oracle Database 19c upgrade documentation consolidates release behavior changes, deprecations, and desupport notices to help upgrade planning.

deprecated.title: Oracle Text FILE_DATASTORE deprecated
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle Database 19c, the Oracle Text FILE_DATASTORE type is deprecated; Oracle recommends DIRECTORY_DATASTORE.

deprecated.title: Oracle Text URL_DATASTORE deprecated
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle Database 19c, the Oracle Text URL_DATASTORE type is deprecated; Oracle recommends NETWORK_DATASTORE.
